title: FIGS Investor Relations and Earnings Summary Overview
text: FIGS investor relations provides comprehensive earnings calendar and financial summary data. Recent earnings show consistent revenue growth acceleration with 28% growth in Q1 2026. Active customer growth accelerating to 12% YoY demonstrating improved customer acquisition economics. Repeat customer frequency remains strong at 70% of Q1 revenue from existing customers. Product innovation cycle maintaining momentum with new fabrications and silhouettes driving category expansion. International presence expanding rapidly with 85 markets as of Q1 2026 vs 32 at end of 2024. Management confidence increasing evidenced by raised full-year guidance. Key operational focus areas: margin protection amid tariff uncertainty, international scaling execution, and community hub expansion. Investor day and earnings call transcripts available with detailed management commentary on business momentum and strategic priorities.
